mapper.sql: `usage`, default_visibility, max_bytes, allowed_mime_types, requires_checksum, requires_scan, versioning_enabled, download_ttl_seconds, upload_ttl_seconds, public_cache_control, private_cache_control, retention_days, delete_grace_days
mapper.insert: insert into oss_usage_policy () values (#{usage}, #{defaultVisibility}, #{maxBytes}, #{allowedMimeTypes}, #{requiresChecksum}, #{requiresScan}, #{versioningEnabled}, #{downloadTtlSeconds}, #{uploadTtlSeconds}, #{publicCacheControl}, #{privateCacheControl}, #{retentionDays}, #{deleteGraceDays}) on duplicate key update default_visibility = values(default_visibility), max_bytes = values(max_bytes), allowed_mime_types = values(allowed_mime_types), requires_checksum = values(requires_checksum), requires_scan = values(requires_scan), versioning_enabled = values(versioning_enabled), download_ttl_seconds = values(download_ttl_seconds), upload_ttl_seconds = values(upload_ttl_seconds), public_cache_control = values(public_cache_control), private_cache_control = values(private_cache_control), retention_days = values(retention_days), delete_grace_days = values(delete_grace_days)
